text.text:
*DataFreshnessSLABreach: events_fact freshness breach*
Table events_fact has not been updated in over 2 hours

*🔍 Root Cause* (confidence: 90%)
The Nextflow finalize step failed due to S3 permission denied error, which prevented the _SUCCESS marker from being written. This blocked Service B from loading data into the warehouse.

fields.text:
*Affected Systems*
events_fact, Nextflow, Service B Loader

text.text:
*📋 Recommended Actions*
• [HIGH] Rerun Nextflow finalize step
• [CRITICAL] Fix IAM permissions for s3:PutObject

elements.text: 🤖 Investigation completed in 1.1s | 4 hypotheses tested | 6 steps executed
